detail.description:
◎ Start the world's most delicious growth!

The Great Journey of a Novice Chef Dragon!

Gather fresh ingredients to complete legendary recipes and grow your own special Dragon Chef.

Amidst your busy daily life, a delicious adventure that delights your eyes and ears begins now.

◎ Fast-paced growth you won't be able to take your eyes off! Hungry Dragon: Idle RPG

The thrilling sensation of getting stronger without a break!

Cook up dungeons with flashy skills.

The Dragon's cooking never stops,
